query: Use datocms-setup-migration-release-workflow to add a local release helper for DatoCMS migrations with maintenance mode and promotion.
Please invoke datocms-setup-migration-release-workflow. I already have datocms CLI migrations working and now I want a repeatable production release flow.
Run datocms-setup-migration-release-workflow and also scaffold the optional GitHub Actions workflow for the release helper.

Use datocms-setup-migrations to prepare this repo for CLI migrations.
